name: Daniel Ng
description: Daniel Ng — finance, crypto, and a few obsessions: menswear, watches, cars, food, photography.
about: British born, Singaporean Malaysian. Lived and worked in London (to 2024), New York City (2024–2026), and San Francisco (2026–present).
timelineText: Started in accounting, then made the uncommon move into investment banking (M&A). Crypto went full-time and changed my life — trading .jpegs, arbitraging inefficiencies, and catching the hottest narratives, growing a personal account from 5 to 7 figures. An MBA at Columbia Business School followed (thank you, crypto), then back to corporate, refining skills on the Tech M&A team at Evercore. The end goal: founder and/or career finance guy, with a few side careers in mind — supercar salesman, fitness trainer to working professionals, sartorial menswear advisor.
contactText: Always open to talking about any of the above. Reach out on…
